rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes when referring to component ports
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if-then-else for branching logic
generic_rules: Write guarantees that relate visible outputs to visible inputs in component type contracts
Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) for contract expressions
Declare constants and equations with valid AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool)
Avoid referencing AADL properties as AGREE variables unless explicitly exposed as ports or constants
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `assume "label": expression;` and `guarantee "label": expression;` syntax for contracts
Use `eq name : type = expression;` for equation declarations
Use `const name : type = value;` for constant declarations
anti_patterns: Do not reference implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not invent new identifiers not present in the visible scope of the component
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing properties in AGREE context
Model dependency staging issues for package/data type failures
Validator diagnostics for unresolved references to AADL timing properties
